mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO withdrawal_order ( order_no, user_address, recipient, chain_name, token_address, amount, status, tx_hash, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.orderNo}, #{item.userAddress}, #{item.recipient}, #{item.chainName}, #{item.tokenAddress}, #{item.amount}, #{item.status}, #{item.txHash}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime} )
